subject: [PATCH v4 06/14] mm: preserve RWP marker across PTE rewrites

2026-05-25.patch_summary: This patch ensures that the RWP (Read-Only Write-Protection) marker is preserved across PTE rewrites in various kernel paths, including swap, device-exclusive, migration, fork, and mprotect operations. The goal is to prevent the silent dropping of the PAGE_NONE semantics carried by the uffd bit when a VM_UFFD_RWP VMA is involved. The patch updates several functions to preserve the RWP marker during PTE rewrites, ensuring that the correct protection flags are maintained.
